name: Slow Bloom
description: Gradual harmonic unfolding like time-lapse flower

prompts.label: gradual harmonic bloom unfolding like time-lapse flower opening
prompts.text: gradual harmonic bloom unfolding like time-lapse flower opening, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: slowly expanding pad revealing new frequency layers
prompts.text: slowly expanding pad revealing new frequency layers, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: sonic petals unfurling with patient warmth
prompts.text: sonic petals unfurling with patient warmth, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: reverb space growing from tiny room to vast hall
prompts.text: reverb space growing from tiny room to vast hall, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: overtone series awakening one partial at a time
prompts.text: overtone series awakening one partial at a time, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
